title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 38.
content:
There was an Old Man of Quebec,
    A beetle ran over his neck;
    But he cried, "With a needle,
    I'll slay you, O beadle!"
    That angry Old Man of Quebec.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 38.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
